mnemonics.title: DAO Components
mnemonics.content: S.T.G. - Smart contracts (Rules), Treasury (Funds), Governance token (Voting Power)

mnemonics.title: The DAO Hack Key Facts
mnemonics.content: 2016: $150M raised → $60M stolen → ETH forked → ETC remains

acronyms.usage: An entity governed by smart contracts with no central authority
Standard for fungible tokens used in DAO governance
Wallet requiring multiple keys for transaction authorization in DAO treasuries
Gas-free governance voting by recording token balances at specific blocks
Specialized department DAO created by parent DAO for specific functions

visualTips.visualization: Draw three concentric circles: Inner (Smart Contracts) as the brain, Middle (Treasury) as the heart pumping funds, Outer (Governance Token) as the skin enabling member participation. Arrows flow from outer to inner showing how token holders influence contracts.
Bar chart comparing token-weighted (exponential gap favoring whales), quadratic (diminishing returns), and conviction (time-accumulated) voting - showing how each mechanism affects equality.
Circular flowchart: Proposal → Discussion → Voting → Execution → Monitoring → Proposal... with feedback loops showing how outcomes influence future proposals.

analogies.analogy: Like a robot following programmed instructions, a DAO executes decisions automatically based on code rules. There's no CEO—just algorithms that anyone can inspect and verify.
Governance tokens work like company stock with voting rights, but instead of quarterly meetings, voting happens continuously on the blockchain, and results execute automatically.

analogies.concept: Treasury as a Digital Cooperative Bank
analogies.analogy: The DAO treasury acts like a cooperative bank where all members collectively own the funds, and withdrawals require group approval through transparent voting—unlike traditional banks with opaque decision-making.
Timelocks work like safety brakes on a roller coaster—they don't stop the ride but give passengers (members) a moment to react and exit if dangerous ahead.
